structuredPlan.goal: Audit HELiXiR's accessibility scoring dimension and produce an enhancement proposal that upgrades from heuristic-only analysis to source-level analysis with new sub-metrics and improved confidence levels.

acceptanceCriteria.description: Current accessibility scorer fully documented with all 8 detected signals explained and gaps identified against WCAG 2.1 AA requirements
Enhancement proposal document created with specific sub-metric additions (ARIA pattern completeness, keyboard interaction coverage, focus trap detection, screen reader announcements)
Weight rebalancing recommendation documented with justification comparing accessibility (current 10) to CEM Completeness (15) and Critical tier importance
At least 3 concrete, implementable improvements ranked by impact with feasibility assessment and implementation steps

tasks.title: Audit current accessibility analyzer implementation
tasks.description: Read and document the accessibility analyzer source code. Identify the 8 signals currently detected (disabled field, label support, focus method, accessibility description, form association, ARIA role, ARIA attributes, keyboard events), their implementation, known limitations, false positives/negatives, and gaps against WCAG 2.1 AA requirements.

tasks.title: Research current accessibility scoring via MCP tools
tasks.description: Use HELiXiR's MCP tools (score_component and analyze_accessibility) on example components like hx-button to understand actual output format, confidence levels, and what metadata is currently available from CEM. Document observed signals and any gaps.

tasks.title: Review audit and calibration workflows
tasks.description: Read health-scanning-audit-workflow.md and scoring-calibration-workflow.md to understand the current audit methodology, scoring calibration approach, confidence level determination, and how accessibility fits into the overall health model.

tasks.title: Analyze Lit-specific accessibility patterns
tasks.description: Research how Lit components expose accessibility metadata. Identify source-level patterns: @aria-* decorators, @query for focus targets, reflected ARIA properties, connectedCallback focus restoration, Shadow DOM focus management, and keyboard event handlers that could enable source-level analysis.

tasks.title: Compare against WCAG 2.1 AA requirements
tasks.description: Map the current 8 signals against WCAG 2.1 AA Level AA success criteria. Document which requirements are covered by current signals, which are missing, identify false positive/negative patterns, and highlight accessibility patterns most relevant to a component library.
tasks.verifyCommand: echo 'Manual verification against WCAG 2.1 AA checklist'

tasks.title: Define new accessibility sub-metrics
tasks.description: Design 4+ specific sub-metrics: (1) ARIA pattern completeness (dialog has role, aria-modal, aria-labelledby), (2) keyboard interaction coverage (handlers for expected keys), (3) focus trap detection (overlay components), (4) screen reader announcements (aria-live, aria-atomic). Define criteria and scoring rules for each.

tasks.title: Document weight rebalancing recommendation
tasks.description: Analyze whether accessibility weight should increase from 10 to 15 (matching CEM Completeness) or higher given Critical tier importance. Provide recommendation with quantified justification: impact on overall health scores, component guidance implications, and precedent from similar scoring systems.

tasks.title: Create confidence upgrade path strategy
tasks.description: Document requirements to move from 'heuristic' to 'verified' confidence. Include: source code inspection capabilities, runtime analysis integration approach, validation methodology against real component behavior, and effort estimation for each phase.

tasks.title: Rank improvements by impact and feasibility
tasks.description: Evaluate and rank at least 3 concrete improvements: (1) source-level ARIA analysis, (2) keyboard event detection, (3) ARIA pattern templates. For each: describe improvement, impact (high/medium/low), feasibility (easy/medium/hard), provide implementation steps, estimate effort, and list dependencies.

tasks.title: Produce final enhancement proposal document
tasks.description: Compile comprehensive proposal in .automaker/context/accessibility-enhancement-proposal.md with sections: executive summary, current state assessment, WCAG 2.1 AA gaps analysis, new sub-metrics definitions with scoring rules, weight recommendation with justification, confidence upgrade path, and ranked improvement list with implementation roadmap.

deviationRules.action: Use find src -name '*accessibility*' -o -name '*a11y*' to locate analyzer, or examine score_component MCP tool for the actual scoring logic

deviationRules.condition: If HELiXiR MCP tools are unavailable or require authentication
deviationRules.action: Manually inspect component source code (hx-button, hx-dialog, etc.) to understand CEM structure and available metadata
Infer methodology by examining analyzer code structure, confidence levels in scoring output, and calibration patterns in codebase
Create directory structure with mkdir -p .automaker/context/ and document findings there

deviationRules.condition: If unable to access Lit internals or component source directly
deviationRules.action: Reference official Lit documentation and WCAG patterns, create theoretical mapping of source-level patterns to accessibility improvements
